title: Insomnia Tracker
description: Keep track of the insomnia timer (when phantoms spawn)
body:
Displays a message to a player if they haven't slept in three in-game days (72000 ticks) or after resetting [insomnia](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Insomnia) by entering a bed.

This mod does nothing if `doInsomnia` is set to `false`.

Has compatibility with [Phantom Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/phantom-redux).
